Supplemental maturity schedule giving current portion of long-term debt; matches current maturities and reconciles with current interest-bearing liabilities excluding leases when combined with bank overdrafts.

variables.notes: Chose minimal non-lease current debt components. 'LT Debt 1 Year' captures current maturities of long-term debt, and 'Bank overdrafts' fills the short-term borrowing piece in years where current interest-bearing liabilities exceed LT Debt 1 Year. Avoided lease rows per rule and avoided using generic duplicated 'Interest-bearing liabilities' label.
